instructions_coverage.notes: All 10 instructions extracted from SKILL.md are exercised across the three scenarios. Scenario-01 covers I01–I08 via a full categorization task. Scenario-02 focuses on I02 and I09 (rebalancing overloaded Must tier). Scenario-03 targets I01, I03, and I06 (stakeholder-preference adjudication). Coverage is 85% because some edge cases (escalation path in I09, multi-release split) are not fully tested within the three scenarios.
